symptom: a chest X-ray that looks wrong in a way that is hard to place and ribs that curve like wavy ribbons instead of straight bars
hook: the ribs look like someone swapped straight bones for rippling ribbons
whatYouSee: Both sets of ribs have a wavy twisted edge and look thin and ribbon-like instead of smooth and flat.
whyItMatters: A rare inherited condition reshapes bone and nerve tissue and can twist the ribs and bow the long bones and curve the spine.
treatment: There is no cure so doctors watch the bones and nerves over time and treat curved spines and bowed limbs and nerve tumors as they appear.
takeaway: Some skeletons are simply built with a wave.

condition.keyFindings: AP chest radiograph showing the posterior ribs with a wavy undulating ribbon-like contour instead of smooth flat bars with thinned twisted notched rib margins seen on both sides of the chest

laypersonQuestion: Do those ribs look right to you?
seedHint: Look at the edges of each rib. Straight bars or something else entirely?

generated.threadsCaption:
A patient came in with a chest X-ray that looks wrong in a way that is hard to place and ribs that curve like wavy ribbons instead of straight bars.

Then the X-ray loaded 😭

And the ribs look like someone swapped straight bones for rippling ribbons.

Quick diagnosis challenge 🩻

What's the most likely diagnosis?

Wild guesses are welcome 👀
generated.threadsAnswer:
Answer: Neurofibromatosis type 1

👀 What you see:
Both sets of ribs have a wavy twisted edge and look thin and ribbon-like instead of smooth and flat.

🦴 Why it matters:
A rare inherited condition reshapes bone and nerve tissue and can twist the ribs and bow the long bones and curve the spine.

💊 Treatment:
There is no cure so doctors watch the bones and nerves over time and treat curved spines and bowed limbs and nerve tumors as they appear.
generated.ctaText:
If you have ever been told it is just anxiety.

I turned medical gaslighting into a card game.

Real conditions waved off as nothing until the card flips to the diagnosis.

Grab it here 👇🏼
